requirements.task_name: Save 3 quick, low-calorie family dinner recipes to a 'Weeknight Dinners' collection
requirements.task_description: Find dinner recipes that serve 4 people, take 45 minutes or less to cook, have at most 600 calories per serving, and are rated 4+ stars. Save the first 3 matching recipes into a collection named 'Weeknight Dinners'. Success is having exactly 3 recipes saved in that collection that meet all constraints.

requirements.task_name: Create a 'Rainy Day Plan' list with 5 free indoor activities for kids aged 5–8
requirements.task_description: Locate indoor activities suitable for children aged 5–8 that cost $0 and last no more than 60 minutes. Add the first 5 matching activities to a list named 'Rainy Day Plan'. Success is having exactly 5 activities in that list that meet age, location, cost, and duration limits.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark a beginner family mindfulness routine article (10–15 minutes, 10+ comments)
requirements.task_description: Search for a beginner-level family mindfulness routine article that is categorized under Wellbeing, has a session length of 10–15 minutes, was published within the last 2 years, and has at least 10 comments. Bookmark this article to your reading list. Success is having that specific article saved.

requirements.task_name: Add the cheaper of two highly rated family yoga mats under $60 to a 'Home Gym' list
requirements.task_description: In the shop section, find yoga mats for family workouts priced under $60 with ratings of at least 4.5 stars. Open the first two matching products, compare their prices, and add the cheaper one to a list named 'Home Gym'. Success is having the lower-priced of those two products saved to that list.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing the filtered results, when listProducts is called with category === 'fitness_and_yoga', query containing the phrase 'family yoga mat' (case-insensitive), maxPrice is a finite number <= 60, and minRating is a number >= 4.5.
required_variables.value_to_set: { category, query, minPrice, maxPrice, minRating, sortBy, timestamp: this._now() }
required_variables.reason: Record the product search configuration used to find candidate yoga mats so the evaluator can verify the filters matched the task constraints (Fitness & Yoga, family yoga mat query, price under $60, rating at least 4.5).

required_variables.set_condition: Under the same condition as task4_filterParams, after filtering and before pagination, when the filtered array contains at least 2 products.
required_variables.reason: Capture the IDs of the first two products that match the correct filters. These define the specific pair the user is expected to compare, so we can later verify that the saved product is the cheaper of these two.

required_variables.set_condition: After a successful save (success === true) when the resolved product list's name equals 'Home Gym' (case-insensitive) either via listId or listName.
required_variables.reason: Identify which product was actually added to the 'Home Gym' list so the evaluator can compare this product's price against the two candidate IDs stored in task4_comparedProductIds and confirm it is the cheaper one.

requirements.task_name: Set newsletter preferences for 3 topics with weekly Monday delivery at 8:00 AM
requirements.task_description: Configure newsletter preferences to receive weekly emails on Mondays at 8:00 AM for exactly three topics: Healthy Recipes, Parenting Tips, and Mindfulness & Self-Care. Success is having these three topics selected with the specified frequency, day, and time saved.

requirements.task_name: Post a targeted comment on a recent screen-time parenting article for ages 9–12
requirements.task_description: Find a parenting article about screen time rules for children aged 9–12, published within the past 12 months, and post a comment containing exactly 2 sentences that includes the phrase 'family agreement'. Success is having that comment submitted on the selected article.

requirements.task_name: Build a weekend plan with 2 outdoor activities and 2 healthy snacks for kids aged 3–6
requirements.task_description: Use the planner to create a plan named 'Weekend Fun' that includes 2 outdoor activities and 2 healthy snack recipes for children aged 3–6. Assign both activities to Saturday and both snack recipes to Sunday. Success is having a Weekend Fun plan with exactly those 4 items scheduled on the correct days.

requirements.task_name: Create a monthly wellness budget of $200 across 3 categories using the budget planner
requirements.task_description: Use the Wellness Budget Planner tool to allocate a total monthly wellness budget of $200 across three categories: $80 for Healthy Groceries, $70 for Family Activities, and $50 for Subscriptions. Success is saving a budget for the upcoming month with these exact category names and amounts.
